title: PE22 9PJ, Fold Hill Foods Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/ZP3330BV/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Fold Hill Foods Limited Installation name: Fold Hill Foods Permit number: EPR/ZP3330BV/V004  "
